prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-6PCSHOTGLASS-IR-TT Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Shot Glass Set Camping Accessories Travel Cups - 6pc Description: The ASR Outdoor 6pc shot glasses are all made of durable and corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won't rust so you can count on them rain or shine. The smooth metal non-toxic glasses are ideal for outdoor activities like camping and hiking.

All of the metal shot glasses easily stack together so you can conveniently store them without taking up too much space in your backpack or travel bag. Each glass measures just 2" x 2" x 2.5" and weight only 3.2oz with a 1.92oz capacity.

Although these shot glasses were originally designed for camping and travel uses, they are great for use in bars, restaurants, night clubs, home kitchens and bar carts. The stainless steel material is suitable for all liquids including vodka, whisky, tequila, coffee, juice and water.

Our stainless steel shot glasses are super easy to clean. They are dishwasher safe and can be easily rinsed with just soap and water in a pinch. Make sure to clean and dry them thoroughly before and after each use. Search Terms: shot glass set holder dispenser measuring cup 6 shot glass double shot 2oz liquor cabinet flasks for liquor for men flasks for liquor for women camping accessories gear essentials camping gear must haves backpack hiking backpack travel essentials Features: - UNBREAKABLE SHOT GLASSES - ASR Outdoor 6pc set of shot glasses are made of durable, corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won't rust. Smooth non-toxic metal glasses are ideal for outdoor adventures like camping and hiking - STACKABLE DESIGN - All metallic shot glasses easily stack so you can conveniently store them without taking up too much space. Each glass measures 2" x 2" x 2.5" and weigh only 3.2oz with a 1.92oz liquid capacity - VERSATILE CUPS - Although originally designed for camping, the ASR Outdoor metal shot glasses are great for use in bars, restaurants, night clubs, home kitchens and bar carts. The material is suitable for all liquids including whisky, vodka, tequila, coffee, water and juice - EASY TO CLEAN - Pack of 6 stainless steel shot glasses are dishwasher safe and can be easily rinsed with just soap and water. Make sure to clean and dry thoroughly before and after each use. Do not stack while wet - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel; Color: chrome; Dimensions: 2" x 2" x 2.5; Weight: 3.2oz; Liquid capacity; 1.92oz; Stackable: yes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-pc Stainless Steel Shot Glass Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-pc Chrome Stainless Steel Shot Glass Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 6-Pack, Stackable, Dishwasher Safe, Unbreakable, Camping And Travel, 192Oz Capacity

openai.title_differentiation: Unbreakable Stainless Steel, Stackable, Dishwasher Safe, 2Oz Capacity, Camping And Travel, For Liquor, Vodka, Tequila
